title: Resolve source-routing rule: SRD8: correction tensors
description: Route: H_curv / H_exch excluded from ordinary matter source roles. Allowed condition: H labels remain non-inserted diagnostics until tensor definition, source side, divergence safety, and neutrality are derived. Forbidden condition: H tensors absorb ordinary source mismatch or define their own source by divergence. Consequence: correction tensors cannot be ordinary matter sinks or mass patches..
